---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a small improvement to the workflow kit.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What maintainer or agent workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Alternatives Considered

What simpler approach would also help?

## Scope Check

- [ ] Keeps the CLI dependency-free unless strongly justified.
- [ ] Avoids network calls by default.
- [ ] Does not create or require secrets.
- [ ] Preserves no-overwrite behavior.

## Documentation Needed

What README, playbook, roadmap, or checklist updates would be needed?
